crime.value: Attempted rape and murder at Brush Creek; killing of dog Bolo
crime.quote: The same night he killed Bolo and tried to rape and kill me

victim.value: Sandy, a woman walking her dog who survived the attack and is being stalked
victim.quote: He's still after me. He didn't get the satisfaction of killing me that night I had Bolo with me

closed_world.value: Kansas City area, particularly Brush Creek location where attacks occur
closed_world.quote: Brush Creek is like my inner sanctum

culprit_and_motive.value: Charlie 'The Machete' Rastelli, Vietnam veteran; motive appears to be completing his failed attack on Sandy
culprit_and_motive.quote: he's one of those killers whose ego is bigger than a stretched limousine

investigator.value: Sandy, the survivor victim who is investigating her own case
investigator.quote: My first trip tomorrow will be to the Internal Revenue Service

suspect_architecture.value: Single primary suspect: Charles 'Charlie The Machete' Rastelli, Vietnam veteran with physical disabilities and violent intentions toward women. Victim Sandy survived previous attack and is now investigating.
suspect_architecture.quote: Charles 'Charlie The Machete' Rastelli casted a pair of evil eyes over towards what appeared to be his next easy target.

clue_fairness.value: Reader given same information as Sandy: Charlie's name, Vietnam veteran status, bad complexion, and his repeated appearances at public events where Sandy is present.
clue_fairness.quote: he mentioned the fact that this Charlie was a Vietnam War Veteran with a really bad complexion.

social_world.value: Women's advocacy group S.A.V.E. organizing protests and self-defense education, contrasted with predatory male violence. Class dynamics around self-defense resources and community organizing.
social_world.quote: We the women of S.A.V.E. stage this protest here in Brush Creek

reveal_mechanic.value: Investigation through IRS records and police department to identify Charlie using specific descriptive details and behavioral patterns.
reveal_mechanic.quote: My first trip tomorrow will be to the Internal Revenue Service. Once I get what I want from there, my next trip will be

investigator_wound.value: Sandy is a survivor of Charlie's previous attack who lost her dog Bolo in the assault, now driven by trauma and the killer's continued stalking to pursue justice.
investigator_wound.quote: He didn't get the satisfaction of killing me that night I had Bolo with me down here in Brush Creek.

_meta.title: ebook d b reynolds brush creek charlie
